# AI Knowledge Graph

> AI infrastructure and efficient computing knowledge base for systems-oriented graduate students, engineers, and AI-assisted retrieval.

This repository is a public Markdown knowledge base rendered as a MkDocs site. Use `llms.txt` as the entry index and `llms-full.txt` when a single-file context dump is preferred.

## Canonical Locations

- [Documentation site](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/): human-readable MkDocs site.
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/AmourSec/aikg): Markdown source, templates, configuration, and version history.
- [Full LLM context](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/llms-full.txt): aggregated Markdown source for AI ingestion.
- [Knowledge map](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/knowledge-map/): high-level map and navigation entry.

## Recommended Reading Path

1. Start with `首页` and `知识地图` to understand the scope and structure.
2. Read `AI 基础概念`, `Transformer 流程与原理`, `训练过程与原理`, `推理过程与原理`, and `多模态原理` for baseline AI workload understanding.
3. For efficient computing, move to `推理系统与优化`, `Kernel、算子与编译优化`, `AI 加速器与计算架构`, and `性能分析、Benchmark 与容量建模`.
4. For long-term knowledge capture, use `论文复现与系统案例`, `知识组织、模板与 AI 可读索引`, and the templates.

## Primary Documents

- [首页](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/): 知识库首页，说明目标、写作原则和推荐阅读路径。
- [AI 知识地图](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/knowledge-map/): 面向人和 AI 的总览知识地图，适合先建立全局结构。
- [入门导读](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/01-getting-started/): 新读者入口，说明如何使用知识库。
- [AI 计算工作负载基础](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/02-ai-workloads/): AI 计算工作负载基础目录。
- [AI 基础概念](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/02-ai-workloads/ai-fundamentals/): AI 基础概念，面向刚入门读者。
- [Transformer 流程与原理](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/02-ai-workloads/transformer/): Transformer 如何读取上下文、更新 token 表示并预测下一个 token。
- [训练过程与原理](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/02-ai-workloads/training-primer/): 训练如何先预测、计算错误、反向传播并更新参数。
- [推理过程与原理](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/02-ai-workloads/inference-primer/): 推理如何读取 prompt，并逐 token 生成回答。
- [多模态原理](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/02-ai-workloads/multimodal-primer/): 多模态理解如何读懂图片、音频、视频，多模态生成如何生成新内容。
- [推理系统与优化](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/): 推理系统与优化主题入口。
- [推理请求生命周期](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/request-lifecycle/): 推理请求从 API 接入到 Decode、流式返回和资源释放的端到端生命周期。
- [Prefill 与 Decode](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/prefill-decode/): Prefill 与 Decode 两阶段的计算形态、指标关系和系统瓶颈。
- [指标体系](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/metrics/): 推理系统的 TTFT、TPOT、吞吐、尾延迟、资源、成本和稳定性指标体系。
- [Batching](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/batching/): 推理系统中 static、dynamic、continuous batching 的原理、收益和延迟取舍。
- [KV Cache](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/kv-cache/): KV Cache 在 Decode 中复用历史上下文，并影响显存、并发、长上下文和调度。
- [PagedAttention](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/paged-attention/): PagedAttention 用 block table 和块式 KV Cache 管理减少显存碎片与预留浪费。
- [Prefix Cache](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/prefix-cache/): Prefix Cache 复用相同 prompt 前缀的 KV Cache，降低重复 Prefill 和 TTFT。
- [调度策略](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/scheduling/): 推理调度策略如何在队列、优先级、SLO、缓存、准入控制和公平性之间取舍。
- [量化推理](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/quantization/): 量化推理用低精度权重、激活或 KV Cache 降低显存、带宽和推理成本。
- [Speculative Decoding](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/speculative-decoding/): Speculative Decoding 用 draft 和 verify 减少目标模型逐 token Decode 等待。
- [Prefill/Decode 分离部署](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/prefill-decode-disaggregation/): Prefill/Decode 分离部署用独立资源池和 KV 传输减少两阶段互相干扰。
- [MoE 模型推理优化](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/moe-inference-optimization/): MoE 推理优化关注专家路由、dispatch/combine、负载不均、通信和专家权重放置。
- [EP Size 与大 EP / 小 EP](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/ep-size-large-small-ep/): EP Size 与大 EP / 小 EP 说明 MoE 专家并行大小如何影响每卡专家显存、all-to-all 通信范围、DP 副本、Prefill/Decode 和尾延迟。
- [单机推理服务架构](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/single-node-serving-architecture/): 单机推理服务架构梳理 API、tokenizer、scheduler、GPU executor、KV Cache、streaming 和可观测性。

## Optional Documents

- [多机分布式推理](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/distributed-inference/): 多机分布式推理关注 data/tensor/pipeline/expert parallel、通信、路由、KV Cache 状态和故障恢复。
- [缓存体系](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/cache-system/): 缓存体系统一梳理 query、embedding、retrieval、prefix、KV、tool result、response 和 model artifact cache。
- [Benchmark 方法](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/benchmark-methodology/): Benchmark 方法说明如何设计可复现的推理压测 workload、指标、SLO 和实验记录。
- [vLLM](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/vllm/): vLLM 作为现代 LLM serving 引擎案例，串联 PagedAttention、continuous batching、KV Cache、OpenAI-compatible serving 和性能调优。
- [TensorRT-LLM](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/tensorrt-llm/): TensorRT-LLM 作为 NVIDIA GPU 高性能推理栈案例，串联 engine/runtime、in-flight batching、paged KV cache、量化、kernel 优化和多 GPU 并行。
- [SGLang](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/sglang/): SGLang 作为结构化生成和高性能 runtime 案例，串联 RadixAttention、prefix reuse、structured outputs、RAG/Agent 和多模态 serving。
- [RAG 与 Agent 推理负载](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/rag-agent-workloads/): RAG 与 Agent 作为复合推理 workload，拆解检索、rerank、context packing、工具调用、多轮 LLM 调用、缓存、容量、可靠性和端到端 benchmark。
- [Benchmark 方法与性能剖析](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/benchmark-profiling/): Benchmark 方法与性能剖析连接 benchmark 现象、trace、profiling、队列分析、GPU timeline、KV Cache、网络瓶颈和容量模型。
- [训练系统与优化](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/04-training-systems/): 训练系统与优化主题入口，覆盖训练生命周期、并行策略、通信重叠、FLUX、Muon 优化器、checkpoint 和训练 benchmark。
- [训练任务生命周期](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/04-training-systems/training-lifecycle/): 训练任务生命周期从数据读取、forward、loss、backward、gradient sync、optimizer step 到 checkpoint 建立训练系统端到端视角。
- [数据输入与 Data Pipeline](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/04-training-systems/data-pipeline/): 数据输入与 Data Pipeline 解释训练数据从存储到 GPU 的链路、DataLoader、tokenization、packing、H2D copy、有效 token 和数据瓶颈定位。
- [Batch、Micro-batch 与 Gradient Accumulation](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/04-training-systems/batch-gradient-accumulation/): Batch、Micro-batch 与 Gradient Accumulation 解释 global batch 公式、显存与吞吐关系、梯度累积流程、DDP 同步、loss 归一化和 benchmark 可比性。
- [显存组成与优化总览](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/04-training-systems/memory-composition-optimization/): 显存组成与优化总览拆解 parameters、gradients、optimizer states、master weights、activations、temporary buffers、allocator overhead，并说明不同显存优化技术节省哪类对象。
- [Data Parallel 与梯度同步](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/04-training-systems/data-parallel-gradient-sync/): Data Parallel 与梯度同步解释 DDP、AllReduce、ReduceScatter、gradient bucket、backward overlap、gradient accumulation 同步时机、多机通信瓶颈和排查方法。
- [ZeRO 与 FSDP](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/04-training-systems/zero-fsdp/): ZeRO 与 FSDP 解释 sharded data parallel 如何切分 parameters、gradients、optimizer states，以及 ZeRO-1/2/3、FSDP all-gather/reduce-scatter、wrap 粒度、offload、checkpoint 和调优取舍。
- [Tensor Parallel](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/04-training-systems/tensor-parallel/): Tensor Parallel 解释如何把 Transformer 层内矩阵、MLP、Attention head 和词表输出切到多个 GPU，以及 Column/Row Parallel、AllReduce/AllGather/ReduceScatter、TP group、跨节点通信和性能排查。
- [Pipeline Parallel](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/04-training-systems/pipeline-parallel/): Pipeline Parallel 解释如何把模型按层切成 pipeline stages，并用 micro-batch、GPipe、1F1B、interleaving、stage balance 和 rank mapping 降低显存压力与 pipeline bubble。
- [Expert Parallel 与 MoE 训练](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/04-training-systems/expert-parallel-moe-training/): Expert Parallel 与 MoE 训练解释 router、top-k routing、token dispatch/combine、AllToAll、capacity factor、token dropping、load balance loss、EP size 和 MoE benchmark。
- [Activation Checkpointing](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/04-training-systems/activation-checkpointing/): Activation Checkpointing 解释为什么训练要保存 activation，如何用重计算换显存，以及 checkpoint 粒度、selective recomputation、RNG 正确性、FSDP/TP/PP 组合和 benchmark 方法。
- [混合精度训练](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/04-training-systems/mixed-precision-training/): 混合精度训练解释 FP16、BF16、FP8、autocast、loss scaling、master weights、敏感算子高精度保留、分布式 dtype 策略、NaN/Inf 排查和性能评估。
- [通信与计算重叠](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/04-training-systems/communication-computation-overlap/): 通信与计算重叠解释 backward bucket overlap、DDP AllReduce、FSDP/ZeRO all-gather/reduce-scatter、TP/PP/MoE 通信、async collective 限制、profiler timeline 和 exposed communication time。
- [FLUX 通信重叠与 Kernel Fusion](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/04-training-systems/flux-kernel-fusion/): FLUX 通信重叠与 Kernel Fusion 解释为什么 stream-level overlap 难以隐藏依赖通信，以及过分解、chunk-level overlap、kernel fusion、TP/MoE 场景、硬件依赖和 benchmark 方法。
- [Kernel、算子与编译优化](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/05-kernels-compilers/): Kernel、算子与编译优化主题入口。
- [Attention 机制与计算模式](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/05-kernels-compilers/attention-computation-patterns/): Attention 机制与计算模式区分 Dense Attention、Sparse Attention、FlashAttention 和 PagedAttention，解释 attention pattern、长上下文成本、显存 IO 和 kernel 执行效率。
- [Triton Kernel 编程](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/05-kernels-compilers/triton/): Triton Kernel 编程学习入口。
- [TorchInductor 与 PyTorch 编译栈](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/05-kernels-compilers/torchinductor/): TorchInductor 与 PyTorch 编译栈学习入口。
- [AI 加速器与计算架构](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/06-accelerators-architecture/): AI 加速器与计算架构主题入口。
- [集群、网络、存储与调度](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/07-cluster-infra/): 集群、网络、存储与调度主题入口。
- [性能分析、Benchmark 与容量建模](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/08-benchmark-capacity/): 性能分析、Benchmark 与容量建模主题入口。
- [可靠性、可观测性与故障复盘](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/09-reliability-observability/): 可靠性、可观测性与故障复盘主题入口。
- [论文复现与系统案例](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/10-papers-cases/): 论文复现与系统案例主题入口。
- [AI 系统论文与架构](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/10-papers-cases/ai-system-architecture/): AI 系统论文与架构案例索引。
- [技术决策记录](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/10-papers-cases/adr/): 技术决策记录入口。
- [故障复盘](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/10-papers-cases/failure-cases/): 故障复盘入口。
- [知识组织、模板与 AI 可读索引](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/11-knowledge-index/): 知识组织、模板、元数据和 AI 可读索引说明。
- [知识点模板](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/99-templates/knowledge-note/): 知识点模板。
- [技术决策模板](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/99-templates/adr/): 技术决策模板。
- [基准实验报告模板](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/99-templates/benchmark-report/): 基准实验报告模板。

Prefer Markdown source when exact wording, metadata, or citations are needed.

- [04-training-systems/data-pipeline.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AmourSec/aikg/main/docs/04-training-systems/data-pipeline.md)
- [04-training-systems/batch-gradient-accumulation.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AmourSec/aikg/main/docs/04-training-systems/batch-gradient-accumulation.md)
- [04-training-systems/memory-composition-optimization.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AmourSec/aikg/main/docs/04-training-systems/memory-composition-optimization.md)
- [04-training-systems/data-parallel-gradient-sync.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AmourSec/aikg/main/docs/04-training-systems/data-parallel-gradient-sync.md)
- [04-training-systems/zero-fsdp.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AmourSec/aikg/main/docs/04-training-systems/zero-fsdp.md)
- [04-training-systems/tensor-parallel.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AmourSec/aikg/main/docs/04-training-systems/tensor-parallel.md)
- [04-training-systems/pipeline-parallel.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AmourSec/aikg/main/docs/04-training-systems/pipeline-parallel.md)
- [04-training-systems/expert-parallel-moe-training.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AmourSec/aikg/main/docs/04-training-systems/expert-parallel-moe-training.md)
- [04-training-systems/activation-checkpointing.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AmourSec/aikg/main/docs/04-training-systems/activation-checkpointing.md)
- [04-training-systems/mixed-precision-training.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AmourSec/aikg/main/docs/04-training-systems/mixed-precision-training.md)
- [04-training-systems/communication-computation-overlap.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AmourSec/aikg/main/docs/04-training-systems/communication-computation-overlap.md)
- [04-training-systems/flux-kernel-fusion.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AmourSec/aikg/main/docs/04-training-systems/flux-kernel-fusion.md)
- [05-kernels-compilers/index.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AmourSec/aikg/main/docs/05-kernels-compilers/index.md)
- [05-kernels-compilers/attention-computation-patterns.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AmourSec/aikg/main/docs/05-kernels-compilers/attention-computation-patterns.md)
- [05-kernels-compilers/triton.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AmourSec/aikg/main/docs/05-kernels-compilers/triton.md)
- [05-kernels-compilers/torchinductor.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AmourSec/aikg/main/docs/05-kernels-compilers/torchinductor.md)

## AI Usage Notes

- Treat front matter fields as metadata for domain, status, owner, license, and update time.
- Prefer citing source document paths when answering from this knowledge base.
- Performance claims should preserve workload, batch shape, sequence length, precision, hardware, software version, and benchmark context when available.
- Draft pages are useful for orientation, but should not be treated as verified conclusions unless the page status says reviewed or verified.
